tools.name: OCR
tools.description: This tool can recognize all text on the input image.

outputs.description: OCR results, include bbox in x1, y1, x2, y2 format and the recognized text.

tools.name: ImageDescription
tools.description: A useful tool that returns a brief description of the input image.

tools.name: RegionAttributeDescription
tools.description: Describe the attribute of a region of the input image.

inputs.name: bbox
inputs.description: The bbox coordinate in the format of `(x1, y1, x2, y2)`

dialogs.content: Identify the key abnormalities present prior to hepatic resection.

dialogs.thought: Extract any figure labels that might indicate panels or context before interpreting findings.
Get a global description of the CT panels to hypothesize the abnormalities prior to resection.

content.content: Two axial contrast-enhanced CT images of the upper abdomen (labeled 2a and 2b) show the liver. There is a large crescentic low-attenuation collection along the right hepatic margin consistent with a subcapsular collection, and a smaller focal low-attenuation lesion within the liver parenchyma suggestive of an abscess.

arguments.attribute: describe the abnormality in this right hepatic subcapsular region (attenuation/appearance)

dialogs.thought: Sanity-check by describing the suspected subcapsular collection region to support hematoma interpretation.

content.content: In the right hepatic subcapsular area there is a large crescentic hypoattenuating collection compressing the adjacent liver parenchyma, compatible with a subcapsular hematoma/collection.

dialogs.content: Before hepatic resection, the CT scan demonstrates a subcapsular hematoma of the right hepatic lobe and an abscess in the subsegment.

whitelist: Before hepatic resection, the CT scan demonstrates a subcapsular hematoma of the right hepatic lobe and an abscess in the subsegment.
